description_long: This object is a plump, round apple with a smooth, light green skin and a short, brown stem protruding from the top. The surface is subtly dimpled, giving it a natural, slightly uneven texture typical of fresh apples. The coloration is consistent and vibrant, with no visible blemishes or discoloration, suggesting freshness. The apple's shape is nearly spherical, with a gentle taper toward the base and a shallow depression around the stem. The stem is straight and moderately thick, adding to the realistic appearance. The overall look is reminiscent of a Granny Smith apple, commonly found in urban markets and parks.
description: A round, light green apple with a short brown stem and smooth, dimpled skin.
description_view_0: Light green apple with a visible brown stem angled to the left.
description_view_1: Apple viewed from above, showing the stem centered in a shallow dimple.
description_view_2: Apple with stem angled to the right, smooth green surface visible.
description_view_3: Apple viewed head-on with the stem upright and centered.
